latest_articles.title: Passenger nearly pulled out of Ryanair plane after cabin window breaks mid-flight
latest_articles.summary: A Serbian tourist was nearly pulled from a Ryanair flight after a cabin window detached mid-air. Fellow passengers bravely pulled the man back inside the aircraft, which was returning to Thessaloniki. Oxygen masks deploy…
latest_articles.source: World News Headlines, Latest International News, World Breaking News - Times of India
